# Drive-In Tonight

> Imported drive-in theater records undergoing primary-source review, plus independently researched visitor guides.

## Current evidence limits

- The bulk file contains 288 records and no per-record original source or review date.
- Bulk state and detail routes are noindex.
- One source-backed visitor guide is currently published for Shankweiler's Drive-In.
- A bulk record does not establish current operation, showtimes, admission, amenities, or availability.
- The site does not currently run advertising or affiliate links.

## Public pages

- https://driveintonight.com/
- https://driveintonight.com/about
- https://driveintonight.com/contact
- https://driveintonight.com/pennsylvania/shankweilers-drive-in
